summary: APPROVE. SCOPE: 2 requirements map 1:1 to 2 beads (R1=mindspec-lfi3 hook/setup, R2=mindspec-qcjf harness analyzer) in two different subsystems with no shared code. Verified independence: internal/complete does NOT import internal/hook (grep empty), and internal/harness has no reference to key_file_paths/KeyFilePaths or to the hook -- so the two beads cannot collide. All In-Scope file/function references are accurate against the tree: matchMindspecComplete/segmentInvokesComplete/strippedCompleteFields/completeBeadID/runPreComplete exist in internal/hook/precomplete.go; the `pre-complete` dispatch arm is at dispatch.go:33-40; extractMentionedPaths (analyzer.go:694) is consumed only by PlanFidelity (analyzer.go:537). No scope creep -- right-sized ZFC hygiene. IN-BINARY GATE UNTOUCHED: the authoritative gate is panelGate() in internal/complete/panel_advisory.go:137, called at complete.go:281 over the shared internal/panel leaf (PanelGateDecision/ResolveGateFacts), all explicitly listed Out-of-Scope and Non-Goal (spec lines 169-179). R1 only retires the redundant HOOK backstop; the spec is explicit that block parity is preserved by construction (complete does not import hook). TESTABILITY: every AC uses a filtered `-run` (TestPanelGateDecision in internal/panel, TestPanelGate|TestComplete in internal/complete, TestSetup|TestClaude in internal/setup, TestAnalyzer_PlanFidelity in internal/harness) -- all named tests exist. CRITICAL CHECK PASSED: NO AC runs the whole internal/harness package. TestAnalyzer_PlanFidelity_HighScore/LowScore (analyzer_test.go:524,563) are fully hermetic -- they build an in-memory plan + synthetic ActionEvents and call PlanFidelity directly, NO LLM -- and are distinct from the slow TestLLM_* scenarios (scenario_test.go). The spec twice warns NEVER `go test ./internal/harness/...` (AC line 194-205). DOGFOODING/SELF-BLOCK: none. Retiring the hook is pure git-revert-reversible. The orchestrator's own completes are protected by the in-binary gate, which fail-opens without a panel.json (unchanged by this spec), so removing the hook cannot self-block. R2 touches no gate at all (PlanFidelity is non-gating report enrichment, report.go:21/54). MIGRATION: spec correctly requires setup to idempotently REMOVE a pre-existing `mindspec hook pre-complete` entry (Scope line 156-158, AC line 191); the mechanism exists -- removeStaleMindspecEntries derives its keep-list from wantedHooks() (claude.go:254, spec-072 precedent), so deleting the entry from wantedHooks() (claude.go:330 installs it today) removes the stale entry by omission. NOTE (non-blocking): this repo's own .claude/settings.json currently has NO pre-complete entry (only session-start at line 25), so there is no stale hook to clean in THIS worktree -- the migration path is for downstream repos that ran the old setup; the spec's idempotent-removal AC covers it correctly and no extra settings.json cleanup is needed here.
